tasks.label: watch-vscode-extension
tasks.command: if [ -d "${workspaceFolder}/ai-dev-system/vscode_extension" ]; then cd "${workspaceFolder}/ai-dev-system/vscode_extension"; elif [ -d "${workspaceFolder}/vscode_extension" ]; then cd "${workspaceFolder}/vscode_extension"; else echo 'Could not find vscode_extension folder from workspace root.'; exit 1; fi; npm run watch
